problem id: 5b2c143d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND SHR(2)

examples:
  11000010 -> 00010000
  00111000 -> 00000000
  11000111 -> 00110000
  01101111 -> 00011011
  01000001 -> 00000000
  10010100 -> 00100100
  01110101 -> 00001001
  10001000 -> 00000000
  10101001 -> 00001000
  01100111 -> 00011001

query: 00110101
predicted answer: 00001001
